---
name: Bug report
about: Something broke — let us know
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

```bash
# Command you ran
system-design analyze /path/to/repo
```

Include any relevant flags or options.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message and stack trace if available.

## Environment

- ZEA version: `zea --version`
- Python version: `python --version`
- OS: (macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / etc.)

## Repository characteristics (if relevant)

- Primary language(s):
- Approximate size (files / LOC):
- Frameworks in use:

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, partial output, related issues.
